name: access-management-contracts
description: Solidity smart contracts for access management

scripts.test: node scripts/prepare-solc-cache.js && npx hardhat test test/*.test.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:frontend
scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run generate && node scripts/build-frontend.js
scripts.clean: npx hardhat clean && rm -rf frontend/dist frontend/src/generated
